title: E-Commerce Store
description: Developed a responsive e-commerce platform with product listing, cart functionality, and optimized UI for seamless user experience using modern React practices.

title: Travel Tours Website
description: Built a responsive travel website showcasing curated tours and destinations with dynamic data rendering and clean UI/UX design.

title: Reviews Dashboard
description: Created an interactive reviews system with dynamic content switching and smooth navigation to enhance user engagement.

title: Birthday Reminder App
description: Designed a state-driven application to manage and display upcoming birthdays with efficient data handling in React.

title: Book Library App
description: Implemented a digital book management interface with dynamic rendering and structured data handling for improved usability.

title: FAQ / Questions App
description: Developed a dynamic FAQ system with collapsible components and smooth state transitions for better user interaction.
